The wind howled across the endless plains, whipping up the dust in a furious dance, as the sun dipped below the horizon in a blaze of orange and purple. Every direction seemed to merge into the vastness, blurring the lines between near and far, as if the world itself was trying to hold its breath, waiting for something to break the silence.
